title: batch_manifest
description: Frozen contract for the per-offer batch manifest written by scripts/pipeline/gmj_batch.py (SELECT-03/SELECT-04). Local URN $id only (never a fetchable URL — SSRF precedent, see shortlist.schema.json). The manifest is offer-centric: each offer entry groups its per-(offer, artifact_type) run_ids under `runs` (cv/cover_letter/interview_prep) because state.gate_results is per-DAG-node and would clobber across the three artifact types if they shared one run. offer_spec_path/offer_spec_hash are empty-string placeholders at `init` time and are filled post-freeze by the record-spec op (12-02); both empty and populated instances validate. Phase 16 inspects this manifest read-only.

offer_entry.description: One selected offer and its three per-artifact-type runs. offer_spec_path/offer_spec_hash carry empty-string placeholders until the record-spec op fills the frozen freeze values, so no minLength is imposed.

runs.description: Per-(offer, artifact_type) runs. Each artifact type gets its own run_id so Gate A ∧ Gate B are recorded independently and never clobber across artifact types.

run.description: A single per-(offer, artifact_type) run: its run_id (a sanitized run-dir component) and current status.
